violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Using a single-use coffee cup as an ice scoop in the reach-in freezer. Should be using a utensil that is cleanable.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mops being stored in the mop sink were not placed in a position to dry properly.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. Walk in cooler internal and external thermometers not working. Repair/replace as needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Replace ceiling tiles at walk in cooler door when work is finished.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
